title: cobble100ne
body:
!["cobble100ne" title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99501f91eeeb8d261380cf4e9be5d197f3915809_0.webp)
### You no longer need other blocks for building in Minecraft because now this exists!
#### More than 11 artists participated in the creation of this resource pack. We drew 100 cobblestone textures, 10 of which is mossy cobblestone. Textures are placed in the world randomly.
##
![cobblestone tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/431d9fd60f456352108e37eb6a7b220049b52f66_0.webp)
![cobblestones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c21fa098eb95edef1821e5b8b8fd2c44abcdb0b_0.webp)
